label: Run Code Action
description: Runs authored code when flow reaches this action.
comment: [VSR] Advanced raw Luau action emitted inside a protected call.
debugHints: The code can use triggerObject, triggerContext, VRS, resolveTarget, and makeVector3.
Errors are caught and printed so the generated flow can continue.
